subcodes.first_line: O flame kindled with the fire of divine love! At all times art thou remembered, renowned and witnessed in the hearts of the friends [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جذوه افروخته بنار عشق الهی در کل احیان مذکور و مشهور و مشهود و در دل یاران
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @call to unity; prohibition of disunity, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
